intro: Hunt the undead… and turn them into irresistible anime boys.
description:
They were lost to the apocalypse… now they’re yours to claim.

In Zombie Hearts: Turn the Undead into Anime Boys, every battle brings you closer to something dangerous, intense… and impossible to resist.

Explore infected zones crawling with the undead. Fight, weaken, and capture them… then transform them into captivating anime boys with a dark, post-apocalyptic allure.

♥ HUNT, CAPTURE AND REVIVE
Face relentless hordes of zombies and turn your enemies into something far more tempting: your ideal anime boys.

♥ FROM DECAY TO DESIRE
Each boy carries the essence of what he once was. Strong, mysterious, wild… now reborn with a seductive edge that’s hard to ignore.

♥ BUILD DESIRE AND CONNECTION
Get closer to the boys you capture. Unlock intimate moments, deepen your bond, and uncover their hidden sides.

♥ GROW STRONGER, GO FURTHER
Earn rewards, upgrade your skills, and dominate increasingly dangerous encounters. The stronger you become, the more irresistible they are.

♥ UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE MOMENTS
Progress to reveal special scenes and unique interactions. Every victory pulls you deeper into their world.


In a world overrun by the undead… will you control them, or give in to them?
